member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw
member.summary: Defines static methods used to throw exceptions.
member.remarks: The main purpose is to reduce code size, improve performance, and standardize exception messages.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
member.param: Object to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is , or if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to be checked for .
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to which member belongs.
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws either an or an if the specified string is or whitespace respectively.
member.param: String to be checked for or whitespace.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the string is , or if it is empty.
member.param: String to be checked for or empty.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfBufferTooSmall(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the argument's buffer size is less than the required buffer size.
member.param: The actual buffer size.
The required buffer size.
The name of the parameter to be checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfOutOfRange``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the enum value is not valid.
member.param: The argument to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the collection is , or if it is empty.
member.param: The collection to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.
member.typeparam: The type of objects in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
The value of the argument that caused this exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.
member.remarks: If the is not a , the current exception is raised in a catch block that handles the inner exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfLessThan(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is less than min.
member.param: Number to be expected being less than min.
The number that must be less than the argument.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is greater than max.

member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is equal to 0.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Text.NumericExtensions
member.summary: Utilities to augment the basic numeric types.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Text.NumericExtensions.ToInvariantString(System.Int32)
member.summary: Formats an integer as an invariant string.
member.param: The value to format as a string.
member.returns: The string representation of the integer value.
member.remarks: This works identically to value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) except that it is faster as it maintains preformatted strings for common integer values.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Text.NumericExtensions.ToInvariantString(System.Int64)
member.summary: Formats a 64-bit integer as an invariant string.
member.param: The value to format as a string.
member.returns: The string representation of the integer value.
member.remarks: This works identically to value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) except that it is faster as it maintains preformatted strings for common integer values.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummarizationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Controls exception summarization.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummarizationBuilderExtensions.AddHttpProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummarizationBuilder)
member.summary: Registers a summary provider that handles , , and .
member.param: The builder to attach the provider to.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary
member.summary: Holds a summary of an exception for use in telemetry.
member.remarks:
Metric tags typically support a limited number of distinct values, and as such they are not suitable to represent values that are highly variable, such as the result of . An exception summary represents a low-cardinality version of an exception's information, suitable for such cases.
The property never includes sensitive information. But the property might contain sensitive information and thus shouldn't be used in telemetry.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The type of the exception.
A summary description string for telemetry.
An additional details string, primarily for diagnostics and not telemetry.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.ExceptionType
member.summary: Gets the type description of the exception.
member.remarks: This is not guaranteed to be a type name. In particular, for inner exceptions, this will include the type name of the outer exception along with the type name of the inner exception.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.Description
member.summary: Gets the summary description of the exception.
member.remarks: This is a low cardinality string suitable for use as a metric dimension, and it is guaranteed not to contain privacy-sensitive information.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.AdditionalDetails
member.summary: Gets the additional details of the exception.
member.remarks: This string can have a relatively high cardinality and may contain privacy-sensitive information and is therefore not suitable as a metric dimension. It is primarily intended for use in low-level diagnostics.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.GetHashCode
member.summary: Gets a hash code for this object.
member.returns: A hash code for the current object.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.ToString
member.summary: Gets a string representation of this object.
member.remarks: The string returned by this call is not suitable to be used in telemetry as it may contain privacy-sensitive information.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether this summary and a specified other summary are identical.
member.param: The other summary.
member.returns: if the two summaries are identical; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.Equals(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary)
member.summary: Determines whether this summary and a specified other summary are identical.
member.param: The other summary.
member.returns: if the two summaries are identical; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.op_Equality(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary)
member.summary: Equality operator.
member.param: First value.
Second value.
member.returns: if the operands are equal, otherwise.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary.op_Inequality(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.ExceptionSummary)
member.summary: Inequality operator.
member.param: First value.
Second value.
member.returns: if the operands are equal, otherwise.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.HttpExceptionSummaryProvider
member.summary: Http exception diagnosis for telemetry.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummarizationBuilder
member.summary: Abstraction to register new exception summary providers.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummarizationBuilder.Services
member.summary: Gets the service collection into which the summary provider instances are registered.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummarizationBuilder.AddProvider``1
member.summary: Adds a summary provider to the builder.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummarizer
member.summary: Provides a mechanism to summarize exceptions for use in telemetry.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummarizer.Summarize(System.Exception)
member.summary: Gives the best available summary of a given for telemetry.
member.param: The exception to summarize.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummaryProvider
member.summary: The interface implemented by components which know how to summarize exceptions.
member.remarks: This is the interface implemented by summary providers which are consumed by the higher-level summarization components. To receive summary information, applications use instead.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummaryProvider.Describe(System.Exception,System.String@)
member.summary: Provides the index of the description for the exception along with optional additional data.
member.param: The exception.
The additional details of the given exception, if any. Ideally, this string should not contain any privacy-sensitive information.
member.remarks: This method should only get invoked with an exception which is type compatible with a type described by .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummaryProvider.SupportedExceptionTypes
member.summary: Gets the set of supported exception types that can be handled by this provider.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummaryProvider.Descriptions
member.summary: Gets the set of description strings exposed by this provider.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ExceptionSummarizationServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to register exception summarization.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ExceptionSummarizationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddExceptionSummarizer(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers an exception summarizer into a dependency injection container.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the summarizer to.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ExceptionSummarizationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddExceptionSummarizer(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.ExceptionSummarization.IExceptionSummarizationBuilder})
member.summary: Registers an exception summarizer into a dependency injection container.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the summarizer to.
Delegates that configures the set of registered summary providers.
